common.subtitle: Free online developer tools. 100% client-side, no data sent to servers.
common.freeOnlineTools: Free online developer tools. 100% client-side, no data sent to servers.
common.clientSideDesc: Your data never leaves your browser. No data is sent to any server.

home.subtitle: Free online developer tools. 100% client-side, no data sent to servers.
home.tryovanime: Also try ovanime.com — AI-powered manga & webtoon creation platform
home.ovanimeDesc: AI-powered manga & webtoon creation platform for ACGN creators and enthusiasts. Create, share, and explore original content.
home.socialforgeDesc: Open-source social media management tool for scheduling posts, managing multiple accounts, and tracking analytics across all major platforms.

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON data instantly
json-formatter.about: Our JSON formatter helps you format, validate, and minify JSON data instantly. Paste your JSON data and get beautifully formatted output with proper indentation.
json-formatter.features: Smart indentation (2 or 4 spaces), syntax validation, error reporting, minification mode.

base64.name: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings with UTF-8 support
base64.about: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 to text. Full UTF-8 support for international characters.
base64.features: UTF-8 support, real-time encoding/decoding, handles special characters.

urls.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
urls.description: Encode and decode URLs and URI components
urls.about: Encode special characters in URLs or decode encoded URLs back to readable format.
urls.features: Full URL encoding/decoding, component-level encoding, preserves URL structure.

hash.name: Hash Calculator
hash.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes
hash.about: Calculate cryptographic hash values for any input string. Supports MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 algorithms.
hash.features: Multiple hash algorithms, real-time calculation, copy to clipboard.

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time match highlighting
regex-tester.about: Test your regular expressions against input strings with real-time match highlighting and group capture display.
regex-tester.features: Real-time matching, match highlighting, group capture, multiple test strings.

qr.name: QR Code Generator
qr.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, and contact info
qr.about: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, email, phone numbers, and WiFi credentials. Download as PNG.
qr.features: Multiple QR types, customizable size, download as image.

uuid-generator.name: UUID Generator
uuid-generator.description: Generate v4 UUIDs with batch generation up to 100 at once
uuid-generator.about: Generate random UUID v4 identifiers for your applications. Batch generate up to 100 UUIDs at once.
uuid-generator.features: UUID v4 generation, batch mode, copy individual or all.

jwt-decoder.name: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.description: Decode JWT tokens, inspect header/payload, and validate expiration
jwt-decoder.about: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens. View header, payload, and signature. Check expiration status.
jwt-decoder.features: Header/payload inspection, expiration check, pretty-print output.

password-generator.name: Password Generator
password-generator.description: Generate secure passwords with customizable length and character sets
password-generator.about: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords with customizable length and character options.
password-generator.features: Customizable length, character types, copy to clipboard, strength indicator.

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates with live clock and batch support
timestamp.about: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Includes live clock and batch conversion.
timestamp.features: Bidirectional conversion, live clock, batch mode, timezone support.

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, and data storage
unit-converter.about: Convert between various measurement units including length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, and data storage.
unit-converter.features: Multiple unit categories, real-time conversion, precise calculations.

color-picker.name: Color Picker
color-picker.description: Pick colors with HEX, RGB, HSL values and generate CSS code
color-picker.about: Pick any color and get its HEX, RGB, and HSL values. Generate ready-to-use CSS code.
color-picker.features: Multiple color formats, CSS code generation, visual color picker.

markdown.name: Markdown Preview
markdown.description: Preview Markdown with live rendering and syntax highlighting
markdown.about: Write Markdown on the left and see the rendered preview on the right. Supports full Markdown syntax.
markdown.features: Live preview, full Markdown support, split view.

css-minifier.name: CSS Minifier
css-minifier.description: Compress CSS by removing whitespace, comments, and redundant code
css-minifier.about: Minify CSS code by removing unnecessary whitespace, comments, and optimizing selectors.
css-minifier.features: Whitespace removal, comment stripping, size comparison.

html-minifier.name: HTML Minifier
html-minifier.description: Compress HTML by removing whitespace, comments, and optional tags with size comparison
html-minifier.about: Minify HTML code by removing whitespace, comments, and optional attributes with size comparison.
html-minifier.features: Whitespace removal, comment stripping, size comparison.

diff-checker.name: Diff Checker
diff-checker.description: Compare two texts side by side and highlight additions, deletions, and changes
diff-checker.about: Compare two texts side by side with highlighted differences showing additions, deletions, and modifications.
diff-checker.features: Side-by-side comparison, color-coded differences, line-by-line diff.

json-schema-validator.name: JSON Schema Validator
json-schema-validator.description: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema with detailed error reporting
json-schema-validator.about: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema definition. Get detailed error reports for invalid data.
json-schema-validator.features: Schema validation, detailed errors, real-time validation.

html-encoder.name: HTML Encoder/Decoder
html-encoder.description: Encode and decode HTML entities including named and numeric references
html-encoder.about: Encode special characters to HTML entities or decode HTML entities back to readable text.
html-encoder.features: Named and numeric entities, batch processing.

markdown-to-html.name: Markdown to HTML
markdown-to-html.description: Convert Markdown to HTML with live preview and copyable output
markdown-to-html.about: Convert Markdown text to clean HTML with live preview. Copy the generated HTML code.
markdown-to-html.features: Live preview, clean HTML output, copy to clipboard.

ip-lookup.name: IP Address Lookup
ip-lookup.description: Show your public IP address and lookup geolocation for any IP using free API
ip-lookup.about: Find your public IP address and lookup geolocation information for any IP address.
ip-lookup.features: Public IP detection, geolocation lookup, ISP information.

api-tester.name: API Tester
api-tester.description: Test API endpoints with method selector, custom headers, request body, and response inspection
api-tester.about: Test REST API endpoints with method selection, custom headers, request body, and response inspection.
api-tester.features: Multiple HTTP methods, custom headers, response viewer, status codes.

colors.name: Color Converter
colors.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK color formats
colors.about: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK formats instantly.
colors.features: Multiple color formats, instant conversion, copy values.

color-palette.name: Color Palette Generator
color-palette.description: Generate harmonious color palettes from a base color using complementary, triadic, and analogous schemes
color-palette.about: Generate beautiful color palettes from a base color using various color harmony algorithms.
color-palette.features: Multiple harmony types, visual preview, CSS variables output.

js-formatter.name: JavaScript Formatter
js-formatter.description: Format, beautify, and minify JavaScript code with proper indentation
js-formatter.about: Format and beautify JavaScript code with proper indentation. Also supports minification.
js-formatter.features: Smart indentation, preserves strings and comments, minification mode.

css-flexbox.name: CSS Flexbox Generator
css-flexbox.description: Generate CSS Flexbox layouts visually with live preview and copyable code
css-flexbox.about: Visually create CSS Flexbox layouts with live preview and copyable CSS code.
css-flexbox.features: Visual controls, live preview, copy CSS code.

gradient-generator.name: Gradient Generator
gradient-generator.description: Create CSS gradients visually with linear, radial, and conic types plus presets
gradient-generator.about: Create beautiful CSS gradients with visual controls. Supports linear, radial, and conic types.
gradient-generator.features: Multiple gradient types, color stops, CSS output, presets.

box-shadow.name: Box Shadow Generator
box-shadow.description: Generate CSS box-shadow code with visual controls, opacity, and inset options
box-shadow.about: Generate CSS box-shadow code with visual controls for offset, blur, spread, and color.
box-shadow.features: Visual controls, opacity, inset option, CSS output.

text-case.name: Text Case Converter
text-case.description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, snake_case, and more
text-case.about: Convert text between various case formats including UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, and snake_case.
text-case.features: Multiple case formats, instant conversion, copy result.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time
word-counter.about: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text. Includes reading time estimate.
word-counter.features: Word count, character count, reading time, paragraph count.

json-to-go.name: JSON to Go Struct
json-to-go.description: Generate Go structs from JSON with json tags, nested types, and pointer options
json-to-go.about: Convert JSON data to Go struct definitions with proper tags and type inference.
json-to-go.features: Nested types, json tags, pointer options, type inference.

json-to-typescript.name: JSON to TypeScript
json-to-typescript.description: Convert JSON data to TypeScript interfaces with inferred types and nested support
json-to-typescript.about: Convert JSON data to TypeScript interface definitions with inferred types.
json-to-typescript.features: Type inference, nested interfaces, array support.

sql-formatter.name: SQL Formatter
sql-formatter.description: Format, minify, and capitalize SQL queries with proper indentation and keyword highlighting
sql-formatter.about: Format and beautify SQL queries with proper indentation and keyword capitalization.
sql-formatter.features: Pretty print, minify, keyword highlighting, indentation.

cron-generator.name: Cron Expression Generator
cron-generator.description: Generate and understand cron schedule expressions with human-readable descriptions and next run times
cron-generator.about: Generate cron expressions with human-readable descriptions. See next run times.
cron-generator.features: Human-readable descriptions, next run times, copy expression.

csv-json.name: CSV ⇄ JSON Converter
csv-json.description: Convert between CSV and JSON formats with proper escaping, headers, and multiple delimiter support
csv-json.about: Convert between CSV and JSON formats with header support and proper escaping.
csv-json.features: Bidirectional conversion, header support, custom delimiters.

wechat-markdown-editor.name: WeChat Markdown Editor
wechat-markdown-editor.description: Write Markdown with live preview and copy beautifully styled content to WeChat with one click
wechat-markdown-editor.about: A full-featured Markdown editor designed for WeChat public accounts. Write Markdown with live preview, choose from 10+ beautiful themes, and copy styled HTML directly to WeChat with one click. Pro features include AI writing assistant, article analytics, premium templates, and PDF export.
wechat-markdown-editor.features: 10+ built-in themes, one-click copy to WeChat, AI writing assistant, article analytics, 8 premium templates, PDF export, dark mode preview, custom CSS, visual theme designer.

extension-shield.name: Extension Shield
extension-shield.description: Scan Chrome extensions for risky permissions, privacy issues, and security threats
extension-shield.about: Upload a Chrome extension (.zip or .crx) and get a comprehensive security report. Analyzes permissions, CSP, remote code risks, content scripts, and privacy issues.
extension-shield.features: Permission analysis, CSP checking, remote code detection, privacy audit, risk scoring, shareable reports.

json-diff.name: JSON Diff
json-diff.description: Compare two JSON objects side by side and highlight added, removed, and changed fields
json-diff.about: Compare two JSON objects side by side with color-coded differences. Shows added, removed, and changed fields with path information.
json-diff.features: Side-by-side comparison, color-coded diff, path display, copy diff result.

html-to-jsx.name: HTML to JSX
html-to-jsx.description: Convert HTML markup to JSX with proper attribute conversions and self-closing tags
html-to-jsx.about: Convert HTML to JSX with automatic attribute renaming (class to className, for to htmlFor), style object conversion, and self-closing tag handling.
html-to-jsx.features: Attribute conversion, style object conversion, comment conversion, self-closing tags.

yaml-formatter.name: YAML Formatter
yaml-formatter.description: Format, validate, and convert YAML with syntax highlighting and JSON conversion
yaml-formatter.about: Format and validate YAML data with proper indentation. Convert between YAML and JSON formats easily.
yaml-formatter.features: YAML formatting, YAML to JSON, JSON to YAML, validation, custom indentation.

css-grid.name: CSS Grid Generator
css-grid.description: Generate CSS Grid layouts visually with live preview and code export
css-grid.about: Create CSS Grid layouts visually by adjusting rows, columns, gaps, and placement. Get clean, responsive CSS code ready to use.
css-grid.features: Visual grid builder, live preview, responsive code, copy to clipboard.

lorem-ipsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum.description: Generate placeholder text with custom paragraphs, words, or HTML
lorem-ipsum.about: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text for your designs. Customize the number of paragraphs, words, or HTML elements.
lorem-ipsum.features: Custom paragraph count, word count, HTML output, copy to clipboard.

markdown-table-generator.name: Markdown Table Generator
markdown-table-generator.description: Create Markdown tables visually with live preview. Copy as Markdown, HTML, or CSV
markdown-table-generator.about: Create and edit Markdown tables visually. Add or remove rows and columns, then copy the result as Markdown, HTML, or CSV.
markdown-table-generator.features: Visual table editor, add/remove rows & columns, Markdown/HTML/CSV export, copy to clipboard.

socialforge.name: SocialForge
socialforge.description: Open-source social media management tool for scheduling, publishing, and analytics

page-audit.name: PageAudit
page-audit.description: AI-powered landing page CRO analyzer with screenshot analysis and actionable optimization suggestions
page-audit.about: Analyze your landing page with AI. Get screenshots, scores across 5 CRO dimensions, and prioritized optimization suggestions.
page-audit.features: AI screenshot analysis, 5-dimension CRO scoring, visual desktop/mobile comparison, PDF report export, actionable suggestions.

buildflow.name: BuildFlow
buildflow.description: Construction project management with kanban boards, document management, and team collaboration
buildflow.about: Manage construction and development projects with kanban boards, task tracking, and team collaboration tools.
buildflow.features: Kanban boards, project management, task tracking, team collaboration, document management.

color-contrast.name: Color Contrast Checker
color-contrast.description: Check WCAG color contrast ratios for web accessibility compliance
color-contrast.about: Verify color contrast ratios against WCAG accessibility standards. Preview text on any background color and ensure your designs are readable for everyone.
color-contrast.features: WCAG AA/AAA compliance checking, real-time contrast ratio calculation, color preview, CSS output.

meta-tag-generator.name: Meta Tag Generator
meta-tag-generator.description: Generate SEO meta tags including Open Graph and Twitter Card tags
meta-tag-generator.about: Generate complete HTML meta tags for SEO including basic tags, Open Graph for social sharing, and Twitter Card tags with live preview.
meta-tag-generator.features: Basic meta tags, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, character count guidance, live preview, one-click copy.

url-parser.name: URL Parser
url-parser.description: Parse and break down any URL into its individual components with visual anatomy
url-parser.about: Instantly parse any URL to see its protocol, hostname, port, path, query parameters, and fragment with color-coded visual breakdown.
url-parser.features: Visual URL anatomy, component extraction, query parameter parsing, reconstructed URLs, one-click copy.

robots-txt.name: Robots.txt Generator
robots-txt.description: Generate robots.txt files to control search engine crawler behavior with presets
robots-txt.about: Create robots.txt files with a visual editor. Supports multiple user-agent rules, allow/disallow paths, crawl-delay, and sitemap directives.
robots-txt.features: Preset templates, multiple user-agent rules, allow/disallow paths, crawl-delay, sitemap URL, copy and download.

http-status-codes.name: HTTP Status Codes
http-status-codes.description: Quick reference for all HTTP status codes with descriptions and SEO notes
http-status-codes.about: Browse and search all HTTP status codes organized by category with SEO-relevant notes for redirects and error handling.
http-status-codes.features: Searchable reference, 1xx-5xx categories, SEO notes for 301/302/410, Cloudflare-specific codes.

css-specificity.name: CSS Specificity Calculator
css-specificity.description: Calculate and compare CSS selector specificity with visual breakdown
css-specificity.about: Calculate CSS specificity for any selector, see the breakdown of inline/ID/class/element scores, and compare multiple selectors.
css-specificity.features: Specificity calculation, visual breakdown, selector comparison, quick examples, specificity explanation.

webmind.name: WebMind
webmind.description: AI-powered web highlighting and knowledge management Chrome extension
webmind.about: Highlight, annotate, and organize web content with WebMind Chrome extension. Export highlights as JSON/HTML, search and filter by page.
webmind.features: Smart highlighting, notes, search, page grouping, export, 100% private.

sitemap-generator.name: Sitemap XML Generator
sitemap-generator.description: Generate XML sitemaps for search engines with custom priorities and frequencies
sitemap-generator.about: Create XML sitemaps with a visual editor. Set custom priority, change frequency, and last modified date for each URL. Supports bulk import.
sitemap-generator.features: Visual URL editor, priority/frequency settings, bulk import, XML output, copy and download.

og-preview.name: Open Graph Preview
og-preview.description: Preview how your links appear on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Slack
og-preview.about: Preview social media link cards and generate Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags with character count guidance.
og-preview.features: Facebook/Twitter/Slack previews, OG tag generation, character count, one-click copy.

htaccess-generator.name: htaccess Generator
htaccess-generator.description: Generate Apache .htaccess rules for redirects, security headers, and caching
htaccess-generator.about: Generate .htaccess configuration with toggleable options for HTTPS, www, gzip, caching, security headers, and custom redirects.
htaccess-generator.features: HTTPS/www redirect, gzip compression, browser caching, security headers, custom redirects, error pages.
